title: AUGUST HALL - Updated June 2026 - 141 Photos & 119 Reviews
content: Great venue, great staff, awesome for intimate concerts. ART station, good air ventilation, Thorough security, good sound quality, and friendly bartenders.

title: August Hall - San Francisco, CA - Party Venue - Eventective
content: Located in the heart of Union Square and the hotel district, August Hall is one of San Francisco’s original masterpieces. Tiesto, Armin Van Buuren, and David Guetta show up very often in that place.It was the first nightclub in the world to implement Lake Contour 26 loudspeaker processors for audio management.Ruby Skye has played host to a long list of world-renowned DJs.I prefer ruby skye as the best wedding venue due to this reasons.Ruby skye is SF's best special events venue.It's a nightclub and special event venue with 15,000 square feet and 4 distinctively different areas to accommodate up to 900.Two levels of HOT bodies make for one of the best dance clubs in the country.Night club is beautiful and sound quality is amazing. It was the first nightclub in the world to implement Lake Contour 26 loudspeaker processors for audio management.It is also a popular location for the 106 KMEL House of Soul concerts that the radio station KMEL hosts from time to time.The nightclub is housed in the Native Sons of the Golden West building at 420 Mason Street.it had become the Regency III movie theater.I prefer this.

title: August Hall, 420 Mason St, San Francisco, CA 94102, US - MapQuest
content: I've been here a couple of times for concerts, and it's always been a decent experience. The line to get in isn't usually that long, and you can get checked in
